products.name: Standard Industrial Roll
products.description: Baseline production roll, used across general manufacturing lines.

products.name: Premium Coated Roll
products.description: Coated roll for specialised production environments requiring heat or static resistance.

products.name: Custom Specification Roll
products.description: Made-to-spec roll with customer-defined dimensions and material.

products.name: On-site Installation Service
products.description: Engineer-led installation, calibration, and handover at customer site.

products.name: Annual Support Contract
products.description: 12-month support agreement covering troubleshooting, preventive maintenance, and parts.

discount_rules.name: Volume discount — 1000+ units
discount_rules.description: 10% discount on any single SKU when order quantity is 1000 or more.

discount_rules.name: Bundle discount — Roll product + Annual Support
discount_rules.description: 8% bundle discount when any ROLL product is ordered together with the Annual Support Contract. Applies to each eligible SKU bundled with SVC-SUPP-005 in the same order.

discount_rules.name: Regional discount — EU shipments
discount_rules.description: 5% discount on the entire order when shipping address is within the EU.
